summary: Focused UI verification of Packing Slip layout fixes (V.C. 302235 on inside tag, 'Lot Identification Card' title, Invoice No. on inside, large boxed INVOICE NO. on outside). All 4 bug fixes verified in live preview and in the print DOM (3 inside cards + 3 outside slips). No console errors. Save + History regression passed.
seed_data_creation: Saved 1 packing record (invoice 2002, whele nut, qty 450, boxes 3) via Save Record button during test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Packing preview + print layout bug fixes verified in iteration 4. Detailed verification: inside-vc='V.C. 302235', inside-title='Lot Identification Card', inside-invoice-no='2002', outside-invoice-no='2002' with class .slip-inv-no computed font-size 29.33px (vs body 16px) fontWeight 900. Bordered 'INVOICE NO.' label present. 3-cell 'No of Box | 1 / 3 | Box' row rendered on outside slip. Print inside DOM contains 3 .slip-inside cards each with 'Lot Identification Card' and '2002'; print outside DOM contains 3 .slip-outside slips each with .slip-inv-no='2002'. window.print stub confirmed invoked on both print buttons. History tab count incremented to (2). Zero console errors.
